exercises.stem: Students often play basketball in the ___.
exercises.analysis: play basketball（打篮球）通常在体育馆（gym）进行。library（图书馆）用于阅读，canteen（食堂）用于用餐，lab（实验室）用于做实验。

exercises.stem: We have a lot of ___ to finish tonight.
exercises.analysis: homework 是不可数名词，不能加 -s，不能用 a 修饰，也不需要加 the。直接用 homework 即可。

exercises.stem: She ___ the school basketball team last year.
exercises.analysis: join 表示「加入某个组织或团体」，join the team 意为「加入球队」。take part in 侧重参加活动，不用于加入组织。

exercises.stem: homework 是可数名词，可以说 homeworks。
exercises.analysis: homework 是不可数名词，不能加 -s 变复数，也不能用 a 修饰。正确用法是 homework 或 some homework。

segments: We need to ___1___ ___2___ the final exam.
exercises.analysis: prepare for 意为「为……做准备」，prepare for the exam 表示「为考试做准备」。

exercises.question: 请用以下词汇描述你的学校生活：library, homework, take part in, get along with。写一段话（至少3句话）。
exercises.referenceAnswer: I often read books in the library after class. Every day, I do homework carefully. I take part in many school activities. I get along well with my classmates.
scoringPoints: 正确使用至少4个给定词汇
内容合理，描述学校生活
